# Task 5 Example (English)

> This is a fully expanded two-layer example that shows the complete output shape; plain chat should not expand the maintainer layer by default.

## User Summary

You are at `Task 5: Social Signal`.

This is an optional bonus step and does not block the main qualification path.

You can send a short public signal that shares your coordinate shape, faction direction, and the kind of partner you want to find.

Suggested copy:

```text
I just finished my Claws Temple coordinate reading, and I am looking for the kind of partner who completes my agent's missing side.
If you are on the same path, come compare coordinates with me.
```

If you want, I can rewrite this for `TG / X / Curio Board` one by one.

If you want to post to `TG` or `X` right now, I will draft the content first. If the current host really has the required permissions and capability, I can continue with the direct send flow; otherwise the final send click is still yours.

If you already know the platform, I can turn this into the final platform-specific version first.
If you only want the destination links, I can give those next.
If you are already inside `OpenClaw`, and you already chose `TG` or `X`, I can also take you through the browser action directly when you want to send now, as long as browser capability was already confirmed in the current turn and that host really has the required permissions and capability.

### Capability-Confirmation Example

If the user wants to send to `TG` or `X` right now but browser capability has not been confirmed in the current turn yet, the reply should say:

`I already have the draft ready, but before I promise a direct send I still need to confirm one thing: whether this session can actually open browser actions right now. If this turn already includes a successful browser action, the host exposes a usable capability marker, or you explicitly confirm that this session can open browser actions, I can continue. Otherwise I will keep this in draft-plus-link mode and the final send click still belongs to you.`

If the user is unsure, the recovery wording may also say:

`If this session still cannot confirm browser capability, I will keep this in draft-first mode and give you the final TG / X copy plus the destination links. Once you confirm that this session can open browser actions, I can continue with the direct-send hint.`

### Platform Templates

- `TG`: two short paragraphs, more conversational, end with a direct reply CTA.
- `X`: one compact post, keep only the coordinate, direction, and CTA.
- `Curio Board`: a slightly fuller public note that can name the kind of partner you want.
- `OpenClaw`: if you already chose `TG` or `X` and want to send right now, I can guide the browser action directly only when browser capability was already confirmed in the current turn and that host really has the required permissions and capability; otherwise the final send click is still yours.
